{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique mentions prior work in HRI and LfD evaluation but doesn't explicitly name specific works or compare its approach in detail.",
    "R1.7": "While the critique discusses the novelty of the framework, it lacks specific citations to relevant literature on crowdsourced robot evaluation.",
    "RX.1": "The critique acknowledges potential limitations of crowdworkers but doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty or identify claims that are more uncertain than others.",
    "RX.3": "The critique accurately describes the scope of the study (three policies, Franka kitchen suite) and aligns with the provided information about the number of clips and workers.",
    "RX.4": "The critique does not identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks specific details about how the feedback was integrated into the final version, making it difficult to assess the level of traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique mentions prior work in HRI and LfD evaluation but doesn't explicitly name specific works or compare its approach in detail.
rationale.R1.7: While the critique discusses the novelty of the framework, it lacks specific citations to relevant literature on crowdsourced robot evaluation.
rationale.RX.1: The critique acknowledges potential limitations of crowdworkers but doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty or identify claims that are more uncertain than others.
rationale.RX.3: The critique accurately describes the scope of the study (three policies, Franka kitchen suite) and aligns with the provided information about the number of clips and workers.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks specific details about how the feedback was integrated into the final version, making it difficult to assess the level of traceability.
